name: Cabbage Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1 large head of cabbage, coarsely chopped and quartered
1 cup crushed cheese crackers (baked or regular type)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook cabbage in chicken broth on low heat until medium tender. Drain and reserve the broth for future use.
2. Combine creamed chicken soup, grated cheddar cheese, and milk in a bowl.
3. Place the cooked cabbage in a greased 9 x 11 inch casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle the crushed cheese crackers over the top of the casserole.
5. Melt the margarine and mix it with the melted cheese crackers.
6. Pour the melted cheese cracker mixture evenly over the cabbage.
7. Bake at 325°F for 25 to 35 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
